name: jsql-syntax
description: SQL + Jinja2 syntax highlighting for JSql query patterns in Python

enumDescriptions: Dracula — cyan keywords, pink functions, green strings
Monokai — red keywords, green functions, yellow strings
One Dark — purple keywords, blue functions, green strings
jsqlSyntax.theme.description: Color theme for JSql syntax highlighting

jsqlSyntax.tableDefinitionFiles.description: Workspace-relative glob patterns for Python model files such as tables.py. Parsed __tablename__ and sa.Column definitions are used to color known SQL tables and columns.
